judgment.summary: High-growth cloud data company with strong revenue expansion and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis and trading at a high forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 17.8% (0.32 vs 0.27); next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY indicates strong market demand.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.59B shows robust cash generation.
Analyst growth estimates for current Q (33.3%) and FY (43.5%) suggest continued expansion.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 48 analysts with a high mean target of $229.66.
negatives: Operating margin of -33.2% and Profit margin of -28.4% indicate unprofitability.
Return on equity of -53.9% and Return on assets of -9.9% highlight poor capital efficiency.
Forward P/E of 66.94x is very high, pricing in substantial future growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 142.46% suggests significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Snowflake's Q1 results are anticipated to show upside, according to RBC Capital, driven by strong business checks and increased adoption of its Cortex code. The company is expected to report earnings on May 27th, with analysts projecting significant revenue and earnings growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. Investors will be watching for continued momentum in cloud data platform adoption and the impact of AI initiatives.
